questions.question: Define Computer Vision and explain its main objectives.
keyPoints: Definition: AI field enabling computers to interpret visual information

questions.question: Explain the computer vision pipeline with a suitable diagram.
Compare and contrast Image Classification, Object Detection, and Image Segmentation.
keyPoints: Classification: Single label for entire image
Detection: Locates objects with bounding boxes
Output granularity increases from classification to segmentation

questions.question: Discuss five major challenges in Computer Vision with examples.
keyPoints: Illumination variation - same object looks different under different lighting
Scale variation - objects at different distances
Viewpoint variation - same object from different angles
Intra-class variation - different instances of same category

questions.question: List and explain any five real-world applications of Computer Vision.
